Cross-corpus catalog candidate. Wayland D. Hand (1907-1986) was president of the American Folklore Society 1957, chair of UCLA Folklore & Mythology, and Guy Carawan's MA advisor in folklore. Whisper renders him as "Wells in Hand" (Pass 1 #11.6) and "Whale in Hand" (Pass 2 #11.P2.10) — both clear Whisper failures on a canonical academic name. // [LAYER-5: D2-ambiguous, ensemble-adjudication-pending]
